title: This System Turns YouTube Into A 24-7 Sales Machine

segments.text: YouTube is one of the most powerful
underleveraged sales channels in the
world and most companies are doing it
completely wrong. So, this video isn't
about generating subscribers or measly
AdSense revenue. Instead, I'm going to
show you how to turn your channel into a
sales system that runs 24/7,
just as we've done for hundreds of other
businesses just like yours. So, here's
what you're going to get out of this
video. One, we're going to understand
why YouTube is the most valuable
marketing channel for your business.
Two, the strategic approach to attract
your exact target customer with YouTube.
Three, how to come up with video ideas
for that audience. And four, how to move
viewers through your funnel from first
impression to conversion. And five, how
to structure videos to keep viewer
attention and convert. and six, a bonus,
how to set up YouTube specific
attribution to see what content is
actually driving ROI. So, let's start by
understanding the value of YouTube for
your business. So, first, [music] it's a

So, hearing your voice, putting a face
to your brand, and seeing your
expertise, [music] it builds trust that

especially when you're able to give real

Second, it shortened the sales cycle. So
when [music] someone watches three or

[music] scope, and timeline. And that

So [music] while you sleep, someone

why YouTube matters, let's talk about
what a single view can actually be worth
to your business. So to do that, you
first need to understand that a view for
a creator versus a view for a business
are two very different things. So
[music] the average creator monetizes

But a business channel is playing a

be worth a lot of revenue to a business.
Okay? And let's take a business SAS for

it's 20% opt-in. So 30 of those people

focus comes in. Your video shouldn't be

why your retirement plan isn't as secure

decision state videos are all about

[music] up, getting started feel easy

They're already know your approach,

When a viewer finishes one video and

Because even the best strategy won't

And speaking of measurable results,

One of the biggest mistakes that most

how did you hear about us added onto
